get.summary:
ListProjects returns all projects for the authenticated user
Required Permissions:
- read:serverless

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
DeleteProject removes a project by ID
Required Permissions:
- delete:serverless

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description:
ID of the project to delete (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
CreateProject creates a new project with the specified configuration
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless

parameters.name: project.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the project (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

put.summary:
Updates a project in the account identified by the given ID.
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless

parameters.name: project.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the project (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: project.id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the project (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project is created.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the project (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project is created.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the project was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project is created.

name.title:
Name of the project.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and dashes

deletedAt.description:
Timestamp when the project was deleted (or is started to be deleting).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteProject is called.

cloudProviderId.description:
Cloud provider where the project is hosted.
Must match one of the provider IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviders` method.
In this case, `hybrid` isn't supported.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

cloudProviderRegionId.description:
Cloud provider region where the project is hosted.
Must match one of the region IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviderRegions` method.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

state.description:
Status of the project
All fields inside `state` are read-only.

project.title: Project represents a vector search project in the Qdrant serverless environment

v1Project.title: Project represents a vector search project in the Qdrant serverless environment

url.title: URL to access the qdrant project (aka serverless database) without port

restPort.title: The port to use for HTTP REST calls (6333)

grpcPort.title: The port to use for gRPC calls (6334)

v1ProjectEndpoint.description:
Endpoint information to access the qdrant project (aka serverless database).
All fields in this message are a read-only field.

phase.description: The current operational status of the project.

reason.description:
Descriptive message explaining any errors or issues with the project.
Empty when the project is operating normally.

endpoint.description:
The URL endpoint where clients can connect to and interact with the project.
Not set if the project is not yet ready or is disabled.

v1ProjectState.description:
ProjectState represents the operational state of a project in the Qdrant serverless environment.
It provides status information, error details (if any), and endpoint access information.

v1ProjectStatePhase.description:
ProjectStatePhase defines the operational phases of a Qdrant project.

 - PROJECT_STATE_PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified phase.
 - PROJECT_STATE_PHASE_READY: The Project is fully operational and available for use.
 - PROJECT_STATE_PHASE_PROCESSING: The Project is being created, updated, or undergoing maintenance.
 - PROJECT_STATE_PHASE_DISABLED: The Project has been temporarily or permanently disabled.

v1UpdateProjectResponse.title: UpdateProjectResponse is the response from the UpdateProject function
